title: Cobblemon x Farmer's Delight Compat Tweaks
description: Adds various compatibility tweaks between Cobblemon and Farmer's delight
body:
# Cobblemon x Farmer's Delight Compat Tweaks

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfbb732dda64ae221b71293e90409193446335b3.png)

A lightweight compatibility mod for **Cobblemon** and **Farmer's Delight Refabricated**, focused on making both mods' cooking systems feel like they belong together.

## Features

*   Cobblemon campfire pots can be used with Farmer's Delight heat sources, including stoves and supported tray heat sources.
*   Farmers Delight cooking pots can be used directly on campfires.
    *   Crouch to place a cooking/campfire pot directly on a campfire without a tray.
*   Campfires below campfire pots can now be extinguished and reignited
*   Farmer's Delight cooking pot recipes are available through Cobblemon campfire pots where appropriate.
*   Cobblemon food and medicine recipes are available through the Farmer's Delight cooking pot where appropriate.
*   Recipes that use bottles or bowls have been moved toward Farmer's Delight's plating/container system.
*   Cobblemon rice-style recipes now prefer Farmer's Delight rice where it better fits the recipe.
*   Cobblemon apples can be used in selected Farmer's Delight apple recipes.
*   Farmer's Delight crops are accepted in selected Cobblemon food recipes.
*   Cobblemon berries, Galarica Nuts, Mints and Hearty Grains can be planted on Farmer's Delight rich soil where appropriate.
*   Berries now receive rich soil growth bonus in addition to mulching bonuses
*   Farmer's Delight food items contribute to natural materials for restoration tanks.
*   Includes compatibility for **Better Campfire Pot**, including upgraded campfire pots and recipe behaviour.
*   Includes compatibility for **Vegan Delight**, including new vegan substitute items. Campfire pots also persist vegan data.
*   Hearty Grain crops now more closely resemble Farmer's delight Rice Panicles
*   Various recipes from other popular cobblemon mods ported to Farmer's delight's cooking pot

## Design Notes

This is largely based on [Tomtaru's Cobblemon & Farmer's Delight Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tomtarus-cobblemon-farmers-delight-tweaks), but is not a direct fabric port, so there may be some differences.

This mod does not try to make every recipe interchangeable. Some recipes remain tied to the Cobblemon campfire pot when they rely on Cobblemon-specific mechanics such as seasoning, bait behaviour, or larger ingredient-count requirements.

The goal is to preserve the design intent of both mods whilst building synergy between their shared systems so they feel like they belong together. To that extent, this mod makes a lot of design changes to facilitate that vision, but hopefully in a way that keeps everything familiar! All feedback is welcome.

I heavily recommend using a recipe viewer such as EMI

## Requirements

- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
- [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)

## Optional Compatibility

- [Better Campfire Pot](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-better-campfire-pot)
- [Vegan Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegan-delight)(v2.0.0+)

## Reccomended

- [EMI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/emi)
- [Cobblemon EMI Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-emi-compat)
